title: Maliton Muslin Cloths for Baby, 6 Pack Burp Cloths for Baby,100% Cotton 6 Layers Absorbent& Soft Baby Muslins Pack,50x25CM Muslin Squares Baby Essentials for Newborn(Lion & Whale Collection, 6 Pack)
features: 【100% Cotton Material】Made of pure cotton muslin, Maliton Baby Cotton Burp Cloths are soft, breathable and safe, the fabric touching your baby's skin is comfortable and gentle. And softness is more important if you're wiping the area of baby is sensitve.

【Pack Information】Size: 50x25cm (20x10"),contain 6 packs large burp cloths. Having a burp cloth on hand during feeds is a newborn parent must haves, and it can be used to wipe baby's milk, spit-up, mucus and drool.

【Highly Absorbent Design】Muslin Squares with 6 Layers cotton muslin, burp cloths catch most of the liquid quickly，this baby spit up rags help new parents take the brunt of spit-up and you can use these to wipe milk dribbles and drool.

【Ideal Baby Shower Gifts】Every new parent must have this baby essentials，you'll reach for a burp cloth every day after you have a baby or toddler. And the white burp cloths fit for boys and girls if you want to choose burp cloth as a baby shower gift.

【Care Instructions】Please do not dry in the dryer or the cotton muslin material will shrink. Machine wash 40℃ and permanent press, do not bleach and dry clean. After cleaning, please drip dry and low temperature ironing.
